zh.Brimpton, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特布普頓
zh.Brimpton, Berkshire, England: 英國英格蘭波克夏布利普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Sydenham於1440年出生在英國薩默塞特布普頓時，他的父親The elder John Sydenham20歲，母親Joan Stourton22歲。他於1457年與Margaret Harcourt在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布普頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1469年4月17日在他的家鄉享年29歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特布普頓。

zh-hans.Brimpton, Berkshire, England: 英国英格兰波克夏布利普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Sydenham于1440年出生在英国薩默塞特布普頓时，他的父亲The elder John Sydenham20岁，母亲Joan Stourton22岁。他于1457年与Margaret Harcourt在英国英格兰薩默塞特布普頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1469年4月17日在他的家乡享年29岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特布普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Sydenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sydenham in Bridgwater (Somerset), Sydenham Damerel (Devon), and Sydenham (Oxon).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Sydenham was born in 1440, in Brympton, Somerset, England, his father, The elder John Sydenham, was 20 and his mother, Joan Stourton, was 22. He married Margaret Harcourt in 1457, in Brympton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 17 April 1469, in his hometown, at the age of 29, and was buried in Brympton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Sydenham est né en 1440, à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, The elder John Sydenham, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan Stourton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Harcourt en 1457, à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 avril 1469, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Sydenham 1440 in Brympton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater The elder John Sydenham 20 und seine Mutter Joan Stourton 22. Er hat 1457 in Brympton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Margaret Harcourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. April 1469 im Alter von 29 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Brympton, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Sydenham è nato il nel 1440 nel Brympton, Somerset, England, il suo padre, The elder John Sydenham, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Joan Stourton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Harcourt nel 1457, nel Brympton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 aprile 1469, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Brympton, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Sydenhamが1440年にイギリスソメルセトブリンプトンで生まれた時，父The elder John Sydenhamは20歳，母Joan Stourtonは22歳であった。1457年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトブリンプトンでMargaret Harcourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1469年4月17日に故郷で29歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトブリンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Sydenham(이)가 1440년 영국 서머세트 브리프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 The elder John Sydenham(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Stourton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브리프턴에서 Margaret Harcourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1469년 4월 17일 그의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 브리프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Sydenham nasceu em 1440, em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, The elder John Sydenham, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan Stourton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Harcourt em 1457, em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de abril de 1469, em sua cidade natal, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Sydenham родился в 1440 г. в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени The elder John Sydenham было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Stourton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Harcourt в 1457 г. в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 17 апреля 1469 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Sydenham nació en 1440, en Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, The elder John Sydenham, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Joan Stourton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Harcourt en 1457, en Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de abril de 1469, en su pueblo, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra.
